channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Dem strategists fret Harris 'sugar high' is over: 'If you're not nervous, you're not paying attention'
item.description: Democratic strategists, including James Carville and David Axelrod, are calling on the Harris campaign to get more aggressive amid concerns her early momentum has waned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Independent in key House race suspends campaign, saying he was 'pawn' in election fraud scheme
item.description: A congressional candidate who says he was tricked by Democrats into running as a spoiler in a competitive House race in Minnesota is suspending his campaign and endorsing his Republican rival.
item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Foley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump leads Harris by 4 points in Florida: Survey
item.description: Former President Trump is leading Vice President Harris by a narrow 4 points in Florida, according to a new survey of likely voters in the state.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: For Wisconsin Dems, a 2024 win in the battleground state is years in the making
item.description: Democrats are confident that the organizing infrastructure they have been building in Wisconsin could put Vice President Harris over the top on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dem lawmaker reintroduces death row appeals bill allowing for introduction of newly discovered evidence
item.description: Democrat Rep. Hank Johnson reintroduced for a third time a death row appeals bill that would allow inmates to introduce newly discovered evidence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matisyahu says he is voting for Trump
item.description: "I just feel that the Jews are like, under attack, and that the current administration really doesn't care," Matisyahu said.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Harris accepts invite to CNN town hall as another Trump debate appears unlikely
item.description: Vice President Harris has accepted an invitation from CNN to participate in a town hall on the network a week before Election Day, as it appears unlikely that former President Trump will agree to a second debate with her.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota’s ‘uncommitted’ voters go into election unsatisfied over lack of cease-fire, conflicted over Harris
item.description: Minnesota sent the most “uncommitted” delegates to the Democratic National Convention in protest of President Joe Biden’s stance toward Israeli’s military actions in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: House Democrats bet on small and fun events for minority outreach
item.description: The House Democratic campaign arm is increasingly relying on small, community-centered events for its get-out-the-vote efforts among voters of color, looking to increase interest with nonpolitical hooks.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Obama-era DACA program heads back to federal appeals court
item.description: Legal wranglings pertaining to DACA program persist with arguments before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Battleground Dem warns traditional voting bloc being 'split' in 2024
item.description: Sharp declines in support from Michigan's Democratic-leaning Jewish voters could cost Vice President Kamala Harris the 2024 presidential election, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Arizona Senate debate
item.description: Rep. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) and Republican candidate Kari Lake faced off in their only debate in the Arizona Senate race Wednesday, and the two contenders frequently traded barbs. Gallego and Lake, who are vying for retiring Sen.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Biden condemns ‘un-American’ 'lies' about federal storm response as Hurricane Milton nears Florida
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Wednesday blasted his predecessor for spreading an “onslaught of lies” about how the federal government is handling the damage from Hurricane Helene as another hurricane, Milton, was on the verge of making landfall in Florida.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jury selection begins in corruption trial of longest-serving legislative leader in US history
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Jury selection began Wednesday in the corruption trial of former Illinois House Speaker Michael Madigan, once the longest-serving legislative leader in American history. The case against Madigan, who resigned in 2021, is one of Illinois’ largest corruption trials in years.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump-Putin ties are back in the spotlight after new book describes calls
item.description: A new book's assertion that former President Donald Trump may have had as many as seven private phone calls with Russian President Vladimir Putin since leaving the White House has refocused attention on their politically fraught relationship and on Trump's sustained dialogue with world leaders as he
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Brown says no to pro-Palestinian students' demands for divestment
item.description: Supporters of divestment ended their encampment last spring in exchange for a promise that their proposal for divestment would get a vote from the board this fall.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota, dies at 77
item.description: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, a centrist who was the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota and who spent nearly three decades in Congress, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Florida Republican suggests Greene have ‘head examined’ over hurricane claims
item.description: Florida Republican Rep. Carlos A. Gimenez suggested Wednesday that Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) should have her “head examined” after she claimed humans can control the weather.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Harris aims to help adult caregivers with Medicare benefit expansion
item.description: Vice President Harris on Tuesday introduced a new plan to expand Medicare benefits so that the program covers the costs of long-term home care for older Americans. The plan, formally announced on ABC’s “The View,” is aimed at helping the “sandwich generation” take care of their aging parents.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Biden postpones trip to Germany and Angola to monitor Hurricane Milton
item.description: President Joe Biden said Tuesday he is postponing a planned trip to Germany and Angola to stay at the White House to monitor Hurricane Milton, as it spins closer to Florida’s Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How Hurricane Helene may affect the election in North Carolina
item.description: None of the 13 affected counties in North Carolina have a fully operational elections board, according to the state's Secretary of State office.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, Harris look to score points amid Helene response
item.description: Once considered a political-free zone, disaster relief has become fair game for campaign point scoring on both sides of the aisle.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Harris proposes expanding Medicare to cover in-home senior care
item.description: Appearing Tuesday on ABC's “The View,” Harris talked about taking care of her mother when she was dying and personally experiencing the challenges many families face when seeking affordable in-home care for their aging loved ones.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Business groups push back after Walz says they supported paid leave program
item.description: While some small business owners advocated for a government-managed leave proposal, the state’s largest business groups sought to block the proposal in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Rafael Arroyo discusses wasteful spending, studio tax credits, and California's policies in Nevada
item.description: Rafael Arroyo, the Republican candidate running for Assembly District 41, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide, outlining his vision and priorities as the election approaches.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Johnson sidesteps question on whether Trump lost 2020 election: ‘This is a gotcha game’
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday sidestepped a question about whether former President Trump lost the 2020 presidential election, calling it a “gotcha game” that he would not play.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Thousands join pro-Palestinian rallies around the globe as Oct. 7 anniversary nears
item.description: Police used tear gas and water cannons to disperse violent demonstrators in Rome as tens of thousands pro-Palestinian protesters took to the streets in European cities and around the globe, calling for a cease-fire as the first anniversary of the Hamas attacks on Israel approached.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gloria, Turner compete in San Diego mayoral race debate
item.description: The debate between San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria and police officer and challenger Larry Turner covered a wide range of issues from transportation, flood infrastructure failures, housing shortages and of course homelessness.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5
